## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Changes in this PR are scoped to one feature or fix.
- [ ] This feature/fix PR does **not** mix in unrelated tooling/agent metadata changes (for example: `.serena/**`, `.claude/**`, or unrelated Copilot/agent bootstrap files).
- [ ] If tooling/agent metadata changes are needed, they are split into a separate housekeeping PR/issue.
- [ ] Tests/docs were updated when behavior or contracts changed.
- [ ] Any intentionally deferred work is called out in this PR description.
